target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural damage to the target building including collapsed roof sections, exposed internal framing, and widespread window destruction; the damage covers more than 45% of the visible building area consistent with severe damage definition.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural collapse with debris scattered across the ground; roof and upper floors are missing; facade is severely compromised; fire and smoke indicate ongoing destruction consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (45%+ visible area affected) and another DESTROYED (75-100% damage). The overall scene depicts a large, multi-story building engulfed in fire and smoke with extensive structural collapse, debris scattered across the ground, and visible damage to windows and roof sections. The functional impact is likely catastrophic, with both assessed buildings rendered unusable and the surrounding area severely compromised.
